validation_smoke.name: code.elixir L3 validation smoke
signals: mix deps.get reproduces deps from mix.lock and mix test passes
a GenServer's state transitions are exercised through its public API in ExUnit
a supervised process restart returns the system to a known state without manual intervention

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.elixir diagnosis smoke
signals: a GenServer handling slow work in handle_call so its mailbox backs up and callers time out
shared mutable state faked via process dictionary or a global instead of a process
unsupervised spawned process so a crash leaks or is never restarted
atoms created dynamically from input, risking atom-table exhaustion
blocking the LiveView process so the socket becomes unresponsive
